text:
For your Wix site, you can inject the FlowBlinq schema code using the following steps:

1. **Open your Wix Editor**: Log in to your Wix account and select the site you want to edit.
2. **Go to Settings**: In the left sidebar, click on "Settings."
3. **Select Custom Code**: Look for the "Custom Code" option.
4. **Add New Code**: Click on "Add Custom Code."
5. **Paste the Schema Code**: Copy the schema injection code from the Setup tab in your FlowBlinq GEO audit results and paste it into the code box.
6. **Choose the Placement**: Set the code to be placed in the "Head" section for it to be effective.
7. **Save and Publish**: Save your changes and publish your site to make the schema live.

This will help enhance your site's visibility to AI agents. If you have any more questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
